arts.sum: It’s well-documented that Saudi Arabia are after Vinicius Junior, but like Real Madrid, Barcelona are also at risk of losing one of their star players. arts.ttl: Flick takes a check on Quim Junyent in Barca training
arts.sum: Barcelona youngster Quim Junyent was a notable presence in first-team training on Saturday as Hansi Flick took a check on the teenager. Flick has been more than willing to give youth a chance since arriving at the club and Junyent will be hoping he could be in line for some precious first-team minutes in the near future.
